name_en: M4 Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original This Croissant Medium Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, paired with soft calfskin trim and Louis Vuitton Paris leather appliqué. Removable shoulder strap is adjustable on both sides, allowing for crossbody or shoulder carry options.
name_cn:
M4 Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original This Croissant Medium Bag is made of raffia hand-woven by Malagasy artisans, paired with soft calfskin trim and Louis Vuitton Paris leather appliqué. Removable shoulder strap is adjustable on both sides, allowing for crossbody or shoulder carry options.
Gift box packaging may be reasonably adjusted based on stock and may differ from the style shown on the product page; please refer to the actual received packaging style. 5.5 x 5.5 x 5.5 cm (L x H x W)
	•	% Raffia
	•	Calfskin trim
	•	No lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Zipper closure
	•	Appliqué (non-removable)
	•	Fits smartphone, short wallet, and keys
	•	Strap: Removable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 45 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 54 cm
